title: Discord node message formatting error
symptom: When attempting to send a message using the Discord node, n8n returns 'Your message is incorrectly formatted.' This prevents the workflow from completing successfully.
root_cause: The error occurs due to changes in the Discord node's message formatting requirements in versions after 1.82.1. These changes may introduce stricter validation rules that the user's message does not meet, leading to the formatting error.
fix_steps: Rebuild the workflow to ensure compatibility with the older version
Test the Discord node again to confirm it works
agent_instruction: Downgrade your n8n instance to version 1.82.1 and rebuild the workflow.
